summaryAm: መንደር ሰዎች በመጋራት አንድ ትልቅ ሾርባ የሚያዘጋጁበት የማኅበረሰብ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ትንሽ ነገር ሲካፈል ለሁሉም በቂ ደስታ ይሆናል።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: አንድ ተጓዥ በአመሻሽ ወደ ትንሽ መንደር መጣ። በኪሱ ውስጥ ንጹሕ ትንሽ ድንጋይ ነበረው።
pages.textEn: A traveler came to a small village carrying a clean little stone.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A kind traveler arriving at a small village at sunset with a clean stone.

pages.textAm: መንደሩ ጸጥ ብሎ ነበር። ሰዎቹ ትንሽ ትንሽ ምግብ ቢኖራቸውም እያንዳንዱ ለቤቱ ብቻ ያስብ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The village was quiet, and everyone kept their small food at home.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Quiet village homes with people peeking kindly from doors and windows.

pages.textAm: ተጓዡ በመንደሩ መካከል ትልቅ ማሰሮ አስቀመጠ። “ዛሬ የድንጋይ ሾርባ እንሠራ” ብሎ በደስታ አለ።
pages.textEn: The traveler placed a pot in the village square for stone soup.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The traveler setting a large soup pot in the village square.

pages.textAm: ልጆች በጉጉት ቀረቡ። “ድንጋይ ሾርባ ይሆናል?” ብለው ጠየቁ፣ ተጓዡም “በትንሽ እርዳታ ይበልጥ ጣፋጭ ይሆናል” አለ።
pages.textEn: Children wondered how stone soup could become tasty.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Curious children watching the traveler stir the pot.

pages.textAm: አንዲት እናት ትንሽ ካሮት አመጣች። “ይህ ብቻ ነው” አለች፣ ተጓዡም “ትንሽ ነገር ሲካፈል ትልቅ ይሆናል” አለ።
pages.textEn: One parent brought a small carrot to add.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A parent adding a small carrot to the soup pot.

pages.textAm: ሌላ ሰው ቆሎ አመጣ፣ አንድ አያትም ጨው አመጡ። ማሰሮው በቀስታ መቀቀል ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: Others brought corn and salt, and the pot began to simmer.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Villagers adding corn and salt while the soup pot gently simmers.

pages.textAm: በትንሽ ጊዜ ሽታው መንደሩን ሞላ። በር የዘጉ ቤቶች ተከፈቱ፣ ሰዎችም በፈገግታ ወደ መካከሉ መጡ።
pages.textEn: Soon the smell filled the village and more people came outside.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm soup aroma bringing smiling villagers into the square.

pages.textAm: አንድ ልጅ ትንሽ ቅጠል አመጣ፣ ሌላ ልጅም ንጹሕ ሳህኖችን አዘጋጀ። ሁሉም ለሾርባው አንድ ነገር አደረጉ።
pages.textEn: Children helped with herbs and bowls.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Children bringing herbs and setting bowls near the soup pot.

pages.textAm: ሰዎቹ በአንድ ረጅም ጠረጴዛ ዙሪያ ተቀመጡ። ሾርባውን ሲቀምሱ “እንዴት ጣፋጭ ሆነ!” ብለው ተደሰቱ።
pages.textEn: Everyone sat together and tasted the warm soup.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Villagers sharing soup around a long table with warm smiles.

pages.textAm: ተጓዡ ድንጋዩን አጥቦ በኪሱ አስቀመጠ። መንደሩም ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ መጋራት ቤትን እና ልብን እንደሚያሞቅ አስታወሰ።
pages.textEn: The traveler kept his stone, and the village remembered to share.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The traveler washing the little stone while villagers wave goodbye warmly.
